name: Nuvve Holding Corp.
summary: Part I Unless the context otherwise requires, references in this section to we, us and our and to Nuvve and the Company are to Nuvve Holding Corp. and its subsidiaries. We are a grid modernization and advanced energy storage and management company that has developed a proprietary vehicle-to-grid ("V2G") technology, including our Grid Integrated Vehicle ("GIVe") cloud-based software platform, powered by advanced artificial intelligence ("AI").
